title: TrialLedger
description: The cross-run ledger of every distinct config evaluated in a campaign. The honest N the Deflated Sharpe must deflate by is the number of DISTINCT configs (unique DNA / trial ids) searched — not 1, not the per-family series length. Each entry records a config fingerprint, its score, and its verdict, so the deflation N is auditable and a searched grid can never be deflated by 1.

campaignId.description: Identifier for the campaign / domain this ledger covers.

trialCount.description: Distinct configs evaluated = count of unique config fingerprints in entries. This is the honest N injected into the DSR. Never below 1.

entries.description: One row per distinct config evaluated.

configId.description: Stable config fingerprint (prefer DNA id; fall back to trial id). The distinct-count key.

dnaId.description: Genotype id actually searched, when available.

trialId.description: Trial id fallback fingerprint when no DNA id exists.

statistic.description: Which return-series statistic the score is scored on.

score.description: In-sample score for this config under the chosen statistic.

isGridBest.description: True for the single grid-best config selected out of the search.

verdict.description: Per-config verdict, if a full gauntlet was run on it.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the ledger was finalized.
